$comment: Repo-local MCP overrides. Both Chromium-based MCPs are pinned to scripts/mcp-chrome-wrapper.sh which auto-resolves the cached Playwright chromium and layers LD_LIBRARY_PATH from /tmp/libs/extracted (preferred) and ~/.local/chrome-libs (fallback) so Chrome can find libnspr4 / libnss3 / X11 / atk / asound. The system has no /opt/google/chrome and pinning a single absolute path is brittle across iterations because /tmp gets wiped. See WORKLOG.md S-312 (and S-246 for the original repro).
